settings.title: Yatnesh Puranik | Full Stack Developer (MERN)
settings.tagline: Building scalable production-grade SaaS applications using MERN, Next.js and TypeScript.
settings.aboutMe: I'm Yatnesh Puranik, a Full Stack Developer focused on building scalable MERN applications and AI-powered products. During my internship at Three Syntax, I've contributed to a production-grade Multi-Tenant CRM while also building personal projects like an AI Interview Platform and intelligent web applications. I enjoy turning complex ideas into clean, performant user experiences and continuously improving through real-world engineering challenges.
settings.seoDescription: Full Stack Developer (MERN) Portfolio & Resume website. Built with React 19, Tailwind CSS v4, Express and MongoDB.

profiles.title: Full Stack Developer (MERN)
profiles.subTitle: Building scalable SaaS products.
profiles.bio: I'm Yatnesh Puranik, a Full Stack Developer focused on building scalable MERN applications and AI-powered products. During my internship at Three Syntax, I've contributed to a production-grade Multi-Tenant CRM while also building personal projects like an AI Interview Platform and intelligent web applications. I enjoy turning complex ideas into clean, performant user experiences and continuously improving through real-world engineering challenges.

experiences.description:
• Developed production-grade frontend modules for Multi-Tenant CRM.
  • Integrated backend APIs and authentication workflows.
  • Built reusable UI components improving development speed.
  • Collaborated with Agile team for feature planning and reviews.
  • Worked with React, Next.js, NestJS, PostgreSQL and Turborepo.

projects.title: Multi-Tenant Sales CRM
projects.summary: Production-grade SaaS CRM supporting multi-tenancy, authentication, role-based access control, sales pipelines, reusable dashboard modules and scalable architecture.
projects.description: This multi-tenant CRM is engineered for high performance, utilizing NestJS and Prisma to guarantee complete tenant isolation while delivering real-world sales metrics.
projects.problem: Modern sales teams require modular pipelines and client management tools, but existing solutions often lack secure data isolation, cost-efficient scaling, and department-level modularity within a single deployment.
projects.solution: We designed a multi-tenant CRM featuring strict database-level isolation, granular Role-Based Access Control (RBAC), customizable sales pipelines, and departmental organization workspaces.
projects.featuresList:
- **Tenant isolation**: Strong partitioning policies in PostgreSQL.
- **JWT Authentication & RBAC**: Granular permission models for admins, managers, and agents.
- **Department management**: Isolate workflows across different corporate divisions.
- **Invitation workflows**: Secure member invitations using hash verification signatures.
projects.architecture:
The system utilizes a modern monorepo layout:
- **Monorepo Structure**: Managed via **Turborepo** for optimized caching and fast dependency sharing.
- **Frontend**: Built with **Next.js** for SSR dashboard elements and fast data loading.
- **Backend API**: Engineered with **NestJS** utilizing modular controllers and dependency injection.
- **Database Layer**: **PostgreSQL** paired with **Prisma ORM** for type-safe queries.
- **Caching**: **Redis** cache store for active user sessions and auth validation tokens.
projects.challenges: Structuring department-level invitation flows and secure database isolation without exposing boundaries or causing performance degradation.
projects.learned: Implementing PostgreSQL row-level isolation policies with Prisma and orchestrating clean pipeline workflows inside Turborepo monorepos.

projects.title: WorkSync
projects.summary: A collaborative workspace platform inspired by Trello, GitHub and Discord.
projects.description: WorkSync provides real-time workspace sync across project tasks, active member feeds, and channel chats.
projects.problem: Teams frequently split their focus across separate platforms (Trello for tasks, Discord for chat, GitHub for code). Switching contexts reduces output.
projects.solution: WorkSync unifies task management, live messaging, and VCS status feeds in a single web dashboard.
projects.featuresList:
- **Kanban Board**: Drag-and-drop tasks, custom status flows, and assignee assignments.
- **Real-time Workspace Chat**: Live team channels built with WebSockets.
- **GitHub Integration**: Listen to repo webhooks to show commit status in the activity feed.
- **Role Management**: Workspace creator can manage member invites and roles.
- **Notifications**: Instant updates on task assignments and activity.
projects.architecture:
- **Frontend**: Single Page React App leveraging **TypeScript** and tailwind CSS.
- **Backend Server**: **Express.js** and **Node.js** running WebSocket protocols.
- **Real-time Layer**: Synchronized via **Socket.io** connections for immediate cross-client DOM updates.
- **Database**: **MongoDB** storing chat logs, user profiles, and active workspace boards.
projects.challenges: Maintaining consistent socket connection states across rapid route changes and synchronizing task positioning drag-and-drop state dynamically.
projects.learned: Optimizing WebSocket events to reduce network overhead and implementing React Query cache updates on live events.

projects.title: AI Mock Interview Platform
projects.summary: AI-powered interview preparation platform with resume analysis, AI-generated interview questions, voice interaction, interview history and personalized reports.
projects.description: AI Mock Interview uses artificial intelligence models to parse developer resumes and conduct interactive mock interviews, rendering final diagnostic reviews.
projects.problem: Mock interviews are hard to schedule, expensive, and rarely provide objective, granular reviews on communication vs. content correctness.
projects.solution: An automated AI interviewer that listens, transcribes speech, reviews replies, and grades using generative AI algorithms.
projects.featuresList:
- **Resume Parsing**: Direct upload and text extraction.
- **AI Question Generation**: Context-aware questions generated via OpenRouter AI.
- **Voice Interview**: Speech-to-Text (STT) and Text-to-Speech (TTS) mock dialogues.
- **Interview Report**: Detailed analytics on grammar, speed, and answer correctness.
- **History Logs**: Review past sessions to analyze improvements.
projects.architecture:
- **Frontend**: **React** incorporating browser-native Web Speech recognition API.
- **Backend API**: **Express.js** handling resume text processing.
- **AI Interface**: Communicates with **OpenRouter AI (GPT/Claude API)** to evaluate answers.
- **Database**: **MongoDB** storing transcript records and performance scores.
projects.challenges: Processing live browser speech recognition streams and matching text results to AI prompt templates under low latency.
projects.learned: Tuning prompt instructions to minimize latency and designing responsive voice visualizers using Framer Motion.

educations.institution: Indore Institute of Science and Technology

researchPapers.title: Price Prediction in E-Commerce using Machine Learning
researchPapers.abstract: This research centers around designing pricing engines for online retail marketplaces. It maps customer demand, retail competition, and historic sales records using machine learning algorithms to automate profit margin optimizations.
researchPapers.problemStatement: E-commerce retailers struggle to determine optimal pricing in response to rapid changes in competitor prices, demand elasticity, and inventory levels, leading to either lost margins or low sales volumes.
researchPapers.methodology: We deployed regression algorithms (Random Forest Regressor, XGBoost, and Linear models) to map historic sales velocities and predict optimal dynamic pricing increments.
researchPapers.architecture: Data collection from open e-commerce APIs, processed in Python, and integrated into a Flask dynamic pricing API endpoint querying custom ML models.
researchPapers.results: The Random Forest pricing model achieved a 15% increase in gross profit margins in simulation trials compared to traditional flat-pricing strategies.
researchPapers.conclusion: Dynamic pricing powered by ML regression offers real-time margin protections without causing customer cart-abandonment rates to spike.
researchPapers.citation: Puranik, Y. (2025). Price Prediction in E-Commerce using Machine Learning. IgniteX 2025 Conference Proceedings.

researchPapers.title: HydroBloom
researchPapers.abstract: HydroBloom details algorithmic automation for water quality inspection and nutrient dosage cycles in indoor agricultural environments. It uses statistical models to secure crop health and maximize yield rates.
researchPapers.problemStatement: Urban indoor gardens and vertical farms often fail due to improper nutrient balance, lack of soil moisture monitoring, and inconsistent irrigation, which require manual labor and specialized knowledge.
researchPapers.methodology: Designed an automated hydroponics sensory loop using microcontrollers that continuously checks pH values, electrical conductivity, and temperature, trigger-releasing precise water volumes.
researchPapers.architecture: Sensory node microcontroller cluster sending telemetry over MQTT to a Node.js dashboard, coupled with automated relay pumps.
researchPapers.results: Achieved a 30% reduction in water waste and completed automated harvesting cycles with 100% plant survival rate.
researchPapers.conclusion: IoT-driven closed-loop sensory irrigation lowers operating costs and secures high growth rates for urban agricultural installations.
researchPapers.citation: Puranik, Y. (2025). HydroBloom: Closed-Loop Automated Hydroponic Systems. Research Archive.
